framework_context: The Regulated Friction Project documents a statistically significant correlation (r=0.6196, p=0.0004) between high-visibility friction events and institutional compliance events with a 7-day median lag. The Live Trackers monitor the 5 active leverage nodes in real time to detect convergence windows.
